roa.docketEntryComment: PPL MOT TO CONT PRELIM HRG AND MOT TO SUPPRESS FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONTINUE AND DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO APPEAR/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 12-04-18/X: BAIL SET AT $25000/

/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:NEGATIVE ACM REPORT RECEIVED BY THE COURT, DEFENDANT IS ADMONISHED REGARDING ACM RELEASE COMPLIANCE,/CTORD:  DEFENDANT'S ACM REQUIREMENTS MODIFIED TO CHECK IN TWICE PER WEEK IN PERSON AND ATTEND WEEKLY HARM REDUCTION GROUPS/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:I&A, P&C/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:JAMES SENAL /X:DEFENDANT WAIVES THE RIGHT TO BE ARRAIGNED TODAY/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/TWA/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:THE DEFENDANT IS REPRESENTED BY JAMES SENAL, WHO IS UNAVAILABLE UNTIL 05-07-18, SO THE PD IS APPEARING AS A FRIEND OF THE COURT FOR TODAY'S PROCEEDING/BAIL:25,000/CONTD:I&A, P&C/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING, DA MOTION TO CONTINUE/X:THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'SMOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET/X:THE PARTIES ARE NOT YET READY TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE IN DEPARTMENT 12/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/ACM/STWPX/SAORD/SA2:380 10TH STREET, SF/SAORD4:50 YARDS/TE:HALF DAY/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING & JOIN CO-DEFT/DO
/CAL: I&A, P&C/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:05-22-18/987,2/BAIL:100,000/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
